0.title: Current active problems
0.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 1h
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize ActiveProblems = count()

davisCopilot.prompt: How many active problems do I have in the last hour?

data.prompt: How many active problems do I have in the last hour?
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 1h
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize ActiveProblems = count()

1.title: Problems by status last 24h
1.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| makeTimeseries by:{status = event.status}, interval:1h, count = count()

davisCopilot.prompt: Show timeseries of problems by status for the last day

data.prompt: Show timeseries of problems by status for the last day
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| makeTimeseries by:{status = event.status}, interval:1h, count = count()

3.title: Active problems by category
3.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 24h, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| makeTimeseries by:{category = event.category}, interval:1h, count = count()

davisCopilot.prompt: Show timeseries of all active problems by category over last 24 hours

data.prompt: Show timeseries of all active problems by category over last 24 hours
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 24h, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| makeTimeseries by:{category = event.category}, interval:1h, count = count()

5.title: Problem details
5.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize by:{event.name}, count = count()
| sort count desc

davisCopilot.prompt: Show active problems by event name

data.prompt: Show active problems by event name
data.dql:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize by:{event.name}, count = count()
| sort count desc

6.title: Top 15 affected entity types
6.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| summarize by:{affected_entity_types}, problem_count = count()
| sort problem_count desc
| limit 15

davisCopilot.prompt: What are the top 15 most affected_entity_types for problems? Limit to 24 hours

data.prompt: What are the top 15 most affected_entity_types for problems? Limit to 24 hours
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| summarize by:{affected_entity_types}, problem_count = count()
| sort problem_count desc
| limit 15

7.title: Recent problem details
7.query:
fetch events
| filter isNotNull(display_id)
| fieldsKeep timestamp, display_id, event.name, event.category, event.status
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20

davisCopilot.prompt: Show 20 most recent problems. Only show those records that have a display_id. Keep these fields: timestamp, display_id, event.name, event.category and event.status. Sort by timestamp, descending.

data.prompt: Show 20 most recent problems. Only show those records that have a display_id. Keep these fields: timestamp, display_id, event.name, event.category and event.status. Sort by timestamp, descending.
data.dql:
fetch events
| filter isNotNull(display_id)
| fieldsKeep timestamp, display_id, event.name, event.category, event.status
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20

8.title: MTTR
8.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "CLOSED"
| summarize average_duration = avg(resolved_problem_duration)

davisCopilot.prompt: What is the average problem duration of closed problems?

data.prompt: What is the average problem duration of closed problems?
data.dql:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "CLOSED"
| summarize average_duration = avg(resolved_problem_duration)

9.title: Problems closed in last 24h
9.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 24h, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "CLOSED"
| summarize problemCount = count()

davisCopilot.prompt: How many problems were closed in last 24 hours?

data.prompt: How many problems were closed in last 24 hours?
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 24h, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "CLOSED"
| summarize problemCount = count()

10.title: Entity causing most problems
10.query:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| expand affected_entity_ids
| summarize by:{affected_entity_ids}, problemCount = countDistinct(event.id)
| sort problemCount desc
| limit 1

davisCopilot.prompt: Which entity is causing the most problems over the last day?

data.prompt: Which entity is causing the most problems over the last day?
data.dql:
fetch events, from:now() - 1d, to:now()
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| expand affected_entity_ids
| summarize by:{affected_entity_ids}, problemCount = countDistinct(event.id)
| sort problemCount desc
| limit 1
